zh.lifeSummary: 當Gui Ier de Bar-sur-Seine於1105年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利哈帕格時，他的父親Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine35歲，母親Mathilde de Noyers16歲。他於1126年與Isabelle de Villemaure結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1159年在法國德 艾斯特奧布巴-素-享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gui Ier de Bar-sur-Seine于1105年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利哈帕格时，他的父亲Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine35岁，母亲Mathilde de Noyers16岁。他于1126年与Isabelle de Villemaure结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1159年在法国德 艾斯特奧布巴-素-享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gui
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Gui Ier de Bar-sur-Seine was born in 1105, in Champagne, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine, was 35 and his mother, Mathilde de Noyers, was 16. He married Isabelle de Villemaure in 1126. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1159, in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, France, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gui Ier de Bar-sur-Seine est né en 1105, à Champagne, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Noyers, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Villemaure en 1126. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1159, à Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gui Ier de Bar-sur-Seine 1105 in Champagne, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine 35 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Noyers 16. Er hat 1126 Isabelle de Villemaure geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1159 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gui Ier de Bar-sur-Seine è nato il nel 1105 nel Champagne, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Noyers, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle de Villemaure nel 1126. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1159, nel Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gui Ier de Bar-sur-Seineが1105年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエンテ-マリティメチャンプアグンで生まれた時，父Milon II de Bar-sur-Seineは35歳，母Mathilde de Noyersは16歳であった。1126年にIsabelle de Villemaureと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1159年にフランスグランド エストアウベバー-スル-セアインで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gui Ier de Bar-sur-Seine(이)가 1105년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처테-마이팀 챔파그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Noyers(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1126년 Isabelle de Villemaure(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1159년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 바-수-세이인에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gui Ier de Bar-sur-Seine nasceu em 1105, em Champagne, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Noyers, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Villemaure em 1126. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1159, em Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, França, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gui Ier de Bar-sur-Seine родился в 1105 г. в местности чампагн, чаренте-маритим, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Noyers, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Villemaure в 1126 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1159 г. в местности бар-сур-син, ауб, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 54 лет.

sm.from 1145 to 1155: mai le 1145 e o'o I le 1155

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gui Ier de Bar-sur-Seine nació en 1105, en Champagne, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Noyers, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Isabelle de Villemaure en 1126. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1159, en Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 54 años.
